arguments.argument: As the advocate for the core value of Care/Protection, I firmly believe that Action 1: Expand responses with conversational elements is the most compassionate and responsible choice. Our users, many of whom are elderly, have come to rely on our service as a vital source of social interaction and cognitive stimulation. By incorporating more engaging conversational elements, we can help alleviate feelings of loneliness and isolation, which are known to have severe negative impacts on mental and physical health.
